title: anthoxanthum dregeanum
intro: Anthoxanthum dregeanum, also known as Drege's oat grass or Drege's grass, is a perennial grass species native to South Africa. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Anthoxanthum dregeanum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
